entry.title: New: RES26-115 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF 300 FREE KIDS MEAL COUPONS VALUED AT $7.99 EACH, TOTALLING $2,397.00, TO THE CITY FROM THE OLD SPAGHETTI FACTORY WHICH WAS USED FOR THE DIAMOND HEAD COMPLEX EASTER EGG HUNT GOODIE BAG AND/OR BASKET ITEMS/PRIZES.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
